blockers.description: Plan 06 canonical inventory loading/failure currently exposes an enabled legacy action menu, bypassing service authority.
blockers.workaround: Render an explicit loading/error state with no authoritative actions until the canonical inventory succeeds.

blockers.description: Plan 06 canonical Merge bypasses its required confirmation and canonical rendering drops existing Edit/Clean/Run/Issue/Commands actions.
blockers.workaround: Use shared registry confirmation/callback policy and preserve adapted legacy-only actions without making them an authority fallback.

blockers.description: Plan 06 submit-unknown can trap the operation view, terminal reviewed-create failures do not restore editable review, duplicate v shortcuts misroute Pin/Unpin, and note rejection promises are unhandled.
blockers.workaround: Add RED tests for every review path, repair through shared trackers/coordinator, and independently re-review.

blockers.description: Plan 07 scope-menu overlays restore focus to the terminal rather than the invoking scope control.
blockers.workaround: Capture the concrete scope-menu invoker before row.run(), add placement-specific coverage, then re-review.

decisions.decision: Stop at the clean review boundary after committing GSD 1.7.0 instead of starting Plan 126-08.
decisions.rationale: The user requested a restart so subsequent work uses the updated workflows end-to-end.

decisions.decision: Do not merge either Plan 06 or Plan 07 branch until its independent review findings are repaired.
decisions.rationale: Green branch tests did not cover the TUI authority bypasses and web focus placement gap.

decisions.decision: Retain the milestone release boundary: no tag, push, publish, or release before the user's Phase 127 manual verification.
decisions.rationale: This is an explicit user constraint and hosted/manual evidence must remain honest.

next_action: Resume with $gsd-resume-work, acknowledge the blocking constraints, then repair Plan 06 in /tmp/git-stacks-126-06 before touching Plan 08.
